title: No foul play suspected in Point apartment fire
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  A fire broke out at...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  A fire broke out at around 13:30 this afternoon, 19 December at the Point Terrace apartment building in Point Road, Mossel Bay.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A fire broke out at around 13:30 this afternoon, 19 December at the Point Terrace apartment building in Point Road, Mossel Bay."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"According to Southern Cape Police Spokesperson Warrant Officer Chris Spies, no foul play is suspected in regards to the cause of the fire."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mossel Bay Fire, Rescue and Disaster Management teams as well as police and emergency medical services responded to the scene.","html":"Mossel Bay Fire, Rescue and Disaster Management teams as well as police and emergency medical services responded to the scene."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Preliminary reports show at least two people received medical attention,\" said Spies.","html":"\"Preliminary reports show at least two people received medical attention,\" said Spies."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The fire broke out at the Point Terrace apartment building in Point Road. Photo: Gabriélla Siebritz","html":"The fire broke out at the Point Terrace apartment building in Point Road. Photo: Gabriélla Siebritz"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mossel Bay Municipality has confirmed that by 14:15 the fire was under control and later extinguished by 15:36.","html":"Mossel Bay Municipality has confirmed that by 14:15 the fire was under control and later extinguished by 15:36."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
